title: Sanremo
overview: Bruno lives at a home for the elderly and is in love with a co-resident named Dusa. Their love story is fragmented, as they tend to constantly forget each other. Thus, they can always meet for the first time.

trailers.title: SANREMO Trailer | PÖFF 2020
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
